# Check 402 — Payment Enforcement

Check 402 is a micro-SaaS platform that helps developers manage client web app payment statuses through simple API key verification.

## Core Purpose
- Prevent scope creep and unpaid work by enforcing payment statuses.
- Simple integration for any web application.
- API-first approach for payment status checks.

## Key Features
- **Project Management**: Create and track multiple projects.
- **API Key Verification**: Simple REST API to check if a project is 'paid'.
- **Razorpay Integration**: Seamless payment processing for client projects.
- **Dashboard**: Real-time stats on project payments.

## Links
- Homepage: https://check402.com
- Documentation: https://check402.com/docs
- Login: https://check402.com/login
- Signup: https://check402.com/signup
